channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: X Factor finalist appears in court facing attempted murder charge
item.description: A former contestant of the popular television show X Factor has appeared in court facing serious charges of attempted murder. During the court proceedings, the individual reportedly made a heart-shape...

item.title: Starmer's Leadership Under Scrutiny Following Mandelson Appointment Controversy
item.description: The article critiques Keir Starmer’s leadership following a series of questionable appointments and the fallout from the Peter Mandelson affair. It highlights a growing narrative of poor judgment with...

item.title: Ex-Health Undersecretary Denies Role in Promoting Controversial Dengvaxia Vaccine Purchase
item.description: Kenneth Hartigan-Go, the former Health Undersecretary for Health Regulation, denied promoting the use of the anti-dengue Dengvaxia vaccine, despite his past involvement with an entity linked to its di...

item.title: Primark plans demerger to strengthen business after recent challenges
item.description: Primark, the well-known retail company, is reportedly planning a demerger to optimize its business operations following several disruptive events that have affected its performance. The company aims t...

item.title: Shaun Murphy criticises spectator after disruption during World Snooker Championship match
item.description: Shaun Murphy publicly criticised a spectator after being distracted by a comment during his first-round match against Fan Zhengyi at the World Snooker Championship in Sheffield. The incident occurred ...

item.title: Cabinet tensions rise over Mandelson appointment amid Starmer scrutiny
item.description: Cabinet tensions have escalated as Keir Starmer faces criticism over the appointment of Peter Mandelson as US ambassador, despite the lack of security clearance. Sir Olly Robbins, the former Foreign O...

item.title: Pakistan Navy conducts successful test of indigenously developed Taimoor air-launched cruise missile
item.description: Pakistan Navy has successfully carried out a live firing test of the indigenously developed Taimoor Air-Launched Cruise Missile, according to a statement issued by Inter-Services Public Relations (ISP...

item.title: Eight Lawmakers Defect from Parties in Latest Political Shift
item.description: On April 21, 2026, a total of eight members of the Nigerian House of Representatives officially defected from their political parties to join new ones. The defections were announced during the plenary...

item.title: NASA Astronaut Captures Earth Setting Behind the Moon Using iPhone
item.description: NASA astronaut Reid Wiseman, commander of the Artemis II mission, posted an extraordinary video taken with an iPhone showing the Earth disappearing behind the Moon, an event known as 'Earthset.' The v...

item.title: Erwin Ken Parchaso Reflects on 10-Year Journey to Top the Physicians Licensure Exam
item.description: Erwin Ken Parchaso, a graduate of Lyceum-Northwestern University in Dagupan City, was the topnotcher of the March 2026 Physicians Licensure Examination. His name was initially listed as “name withheld...

item.title: NEET PG 2026: Tentative Exam Date, Registration Process and Eligibility Criteria
item.description: The article explains key details about the NEET PG 2026 postgraduate medical entrance exam. The National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS) has indicated that NEET PG 2026 is tentativel...

item.title: Bihar Women's Panel Issues Notice Over Pappu Yadav's Remarks on Women's Participation in Politics
item.description: Independent MP Pappu Yadav's controversial remarks about the political and social status of women in India have drawn sharp criticism and attention. Speaking about the recently defeated women’s reserv...

item.title: DP Kithure Kindiki Urges Ameru People to Back President Ruto for Second Term During Meru Tour
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has clearly told the Ameru community in Meru County that they have no option but to support President William Ruto in the 2027 General Election. While speaking during ...

item.title: DENR Alerts Public on Spread of Invasive Finlayson’s Squirrels in Metro Manila
item.description: The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) recently issued a public advisory about the increasing sightings of non-native Finlayson’s squirrels in Metro Manila and nearby provinces. Na...

item.title: Nawaz Sharif Appreciates Pakistan’s Role in US-Iran Mediation and Commends Punjab Governance
item.description: Three-time former Prime Minister and PML-N President Nawaz Sharif has publicly praised the federal government and Chief of Army Staff, Field Marshal Asim Munir, for their efforts in mediating between ...

item.title: Setlhodi reflects on enduring legacy of the Soweto Derby
item.description: The iconic rivalry between Orlando Pirates and Kaizer Chiefs, known as the Soweto Derby, remains a central part of South African football culture. According to legendary Kaizer Chiefs goalkeeper Josep...

item.title: Mark Carney Forms Advisory Council on Canada-U.S. Relations with Former Political Leaders
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has established a new council to provide strategic advice on Canada-U.S. relations, including economic and trade matters. The council features notable figures from both poli...

item.title: South Korean Police Pursue Arrest of Hybe Chairman Bang Si-Hyuk Over Alleged Investor Fraud
item.description: South Korean police have requested an arrest warrant for Bang Si-Hyuk, the billionaire founder and chairman of Hybe, the entertainment company behind global K-pop sensation BTS. Authorities allege tha...

item.title: Michael Jackson biopic criticised for poor execution and lack of depth
item.description: The Michael Jackson biopic, directed by Antoine Fuqua and starring his nephew Jaafar Jackson, has been widely panned as a tedious and poorly executed film. Spanning Jackson’s life from 1966 to 1988, t...

item.title: Creamline takes commanding Game 1 win over Cignal in PVL All-Filipino Finals
item.description: Malakas ang naging simula ng Creamline Cool Smashers sa PVL All-Filipino Finals matapos nilang dominahin ang Cignal Super Spikers sa Game 1 sa pamamagitan ng isang straight-sets victory. Ipinakita ng ...
